title: Coinbase investing into stablecoin reserves ETF issued by ProShares
snippet: The fund, called ProShares GENIUS Money Market ETF, has $22 billion in assets under management and launched this year.

snippet: Hamilton Lane’s tokenized Senior Credit Opportunities Fund will be the first Securitize-issued asset to launch on TRON.

title: Coinbase invests in ProShares ETF tailored for stablecoin reserve assets
snippet: The exchange has invested an undisclosed amount in ProShares’ Treasury-focused ETF built for the post-GENIUS era as lawmakers debate whether stablecoin issuers can offer yield-bearing products.

title: MoneyGram launches stablecoin
snippet: MoneyGram has launches a US dollar stabelcoin on the Stellar blockchain and issued by Stripe-owned Bridge.

title: Stablecoins Have a Money Market Fund Problem
snippet: The technological novelty defense has a shelf life. For stablecoins, it’s expiring. title: Rigid stablecoin reserve rules can increase default risk, BIS paper finds
snippet: Regulators in the EU, US and elsewhere are moving toward combinations of liquidity and capital thresholds for stablecoin issuers, but the calibration varies widely. snippet: The Move-based blockchain network said it gained access to licensed payment infrastructure as it shifts toward stablecoin settlement and remittances.

title: Zama accelerates compliance after court lifts $12.5M USDC freeze
snippet: Privacy protocol Zama says it will accelerate compliance measures after a court lifted a $12.5 million USDC freeze tied to an unrelated legal dispute.

title: EBA and NYDFS ink stablecoin MoU
snippet: The European Banking Authority (EBA) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the New York State Department of Financial Services (NYDFS) under the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA).
